{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195306A10B9316A60FDA249CFC"}"},"total":162},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554195595107336985","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看的天幕，不会无脑吹，有些细扒历史的章节，和我们现在大部分人知道的浅显历史还不一样，有深度，不会让人感觉在抖音看了一遍，别的作者又做成文字让我又看一模一样的。没有太过于刻板化历史人物，也会有现代对于历史的深刻的负面剖析，以及点评被本人直接看到。大部分的天幕文好像对于评价历史，评价历史人物都没有说得那么的重。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758852861,"group_id":"7515015399641992216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9C4YaBymVAYTL06yAqWevVK1fEK9QYTW7AqZ3z2CpNU","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2184059051322440","user_name":"喜欢哈士齐的乔峰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2184059051322440","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7515015399641992216","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+直播+沙雕+历史脑洞】
苏明晞绑定系统完成三个任务后，带着五千万和一张盛世美颜回到现代。
本以为能躺平当咸鱼，结果系统小星星竟升级回归，还绑定了「万界天幕直播」功能——
她刷的每一个短视频，都在历朝历代同步播放！
…
于是——
嬴政刷到“他推荐的书都火了，读者们纷纷入坑”；
赵匡胤听见“绍宋龙纛前压”；
刘备看到“自己”直播提问“耽美剧是什么意思？”......
…
野史越刷越疯，各朝老祖宗集体破防。
“这哪是野史？这分明是地狱笑话啊！！”
…
系统回归后，一人一统更是彻底放飞自我。
苏明晞表示，既然追求刺激，那就贯彻到底咯。
…
（有史同、磕cp的内容，但是古人们的反应不会写这些，就是喜欢那种舞到脸上的感觉~）
（对清不友好，最友好的内容是给他们看大如）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5ac1b6b5751f8cb5e75826a840fc5b05","author":"快雪时晴不晴","author_id":"","book_id":"7515015399641992216","book_name":"天幕：我刷的野史，古人说是真史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#682818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7515015459465331224","read_count":"44463","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1081791"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"293","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,直播,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a18e547e749eb5ab6969f628a6549f45~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450787&x-signature=N4e%2FKy%2FkRGtakrnKn53vi6GjZBY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1596929489254520","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"184"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195306A10B9316A60FDA249CFC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1657,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36244,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16248},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566286948158243608","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，视频里不是全部是娱乐类的，会穿插历史之类的内容，而且对古人的描述都是很恰当的，不是其它小说越写越敷衍的只写“老祖宗们看着XXX不禁无语／发笑”之类强行凑字数的话，而是有具体写历史人物反应的，并且这种描述不会很繁冗，但是这个小说太容易被审核卡了[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761665889,"group_id":"7515015399641992216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"超级无敌巨雷强制爱，强制爱滚远点，就是qj，说什么病娇强制爱，滚啊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7owlx3empoIGSrVOXBV7Xk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5e2496084d5f4ce7b7d9120192353601~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788320&x-signature=wSjLEc3hkFNKzSegwrEh7MklvwE%3D","user_id":"101790081560","user_name":"视羊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101790081560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1651116062,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7515015399641992216","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+直播+沙雕+历史脑洞】
